calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-17-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of Two Minors.
Dept. 218, VJ: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Maureen Howard.
Petitioners: Yihui Liu and Lan Fang Wu, are present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minors: Yong Qi Liu and Zhi Cheng Liu, and with Cantonese Interpreter: William Guan.
Petitioners and Interpreter were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Two Minors to: Doris Yong Qi Liu and Lester Zhi Cheng Liu.
Decree signed in open court.
